mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_annual_leaves(employee_id, year, total_hours, used_hours, remain_hours) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{year}, #{totalHours}, #{usedHours}, #{remainHours})
mapper.select: SELECT eal.*, e.name AS employeeName FROM employee_annual_leaves eal LEFT JOIN employee e ON eal.employee_id = e.id WHERE eal.year = #{year}
SELECT * FROM employee_annual_leaves WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY year DESC LIMIT 1
